text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading home from work when I hear what
sounds like an argument.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sirius, I'd appreciate it if you could ease up a
little.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Say what now?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Time and time again, you have taken a large
group of students under your wing and occupied
the track, have you not?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We've received several complaints regarding this
matter. While I understand that you have your
reasons, that is no justification to hinder the
other students' training.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's say I give up guiding them. How do
you plan on taking care of them?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In that regard, I believe there is room for
discussion.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is true that the students who come to you are
indeed falling behind on their training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To address that, I'm considering hosting a special
intensive training program, complete with a
dedicated training ground and instructors.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes. What a perfectly by-the-numbers answer.
Typical.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Tell me. What happens to the people who miss
out on this special program?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In the event that happens, we shall furnish yet
another opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
And what happens if they can't attend that one
either?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We would create yet another.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah, a lovely plan! It just goes on and on!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Look here, O mighty Emperor. You don't
understand a single thing.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Most, if not all, of us are born with some sort of
issues we have to face.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Sickness. Injuries. Poverty. Poor conditions
growing up.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
And those issues will rear their ugly heads when
you least expect it, whether that be during a race
or training. We have no say in the matter.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
What I'm saying is that, unlike a model student
like you, they don't have a guaranteed "next
time."

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
That means we have to focus on the present. But
if you don't look at each of them individually, you
can't see the present.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see... You mean to say that it is in our best
interests to employ a training system that
addresses their individual needs.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is a logic to your argument. Unfortunately,
it is also not very feasible.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The result of bowing to every individual need is
that everyone ends up neglected. Not to
mention, we cannot give special treatment to any
one portion of the student body.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I conclude that providing equal
opportunities for everyone does the greatest
good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The discussion has come to a standstill, with both
parties at clear odds. Just as I'm worrying about
how to find an outcome...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. There's no point in continuing this.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there. I know you've been secretly
listening in. Well, which one of us is right?
choice_data_list:
I agree with Rudolf's idea of prioritizing the
collective.

I agree with Sirius's idea of prioritizing
individual runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy cannot function if we lose sight
of what's best for everyone. As a trainer, I have to
agree with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I see. So you're also on the side of privilege.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I hate when people talk down to me. But...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It takes guts to look me in the eye and shoot me
down. I can respect that.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll take you all down next time. That other
stick-in-the-mud included.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps pleased at having had the opportunity to
speak her mind openly, Sirius Symboli leaves
looking rather satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh. And this is why I loathe talking to the privileged.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Must be nice just observing things from up on
high.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But don't forget, you never know what people will
do when their backs are to the wall.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
...Careful you don't find yourself on the receiving
end of such indifference one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A uniform approach can't solve the problems
individuals face. I agree with Sirius Symboli that
we should respect the point of view of each
student.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ah, so you can be reasoned with. Are you one of us, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hey, O mighty Emperor. You're not omnipotent.
You can't haggle with those who don't fit your
mold, and we'll never understand each other. It's
time you come to terms with reality.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even should that be the truth, I wish to continue
my efforts in hopes that we can come to a mutual
understanding some day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Naturally, that means with you as well, Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah. Is that so? If you really mean it, you could start by ditching that pompous, self-aggrandizing moniker of yours, Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their relationship is like oil and water, but their
shared ideal is probably closer than they think. If
they could both give just a little bit, surely one
day they could get somewhere...
